hero.subtitle: Submit your music in 12 categories, get rated on 3 criteria (originality, production, emotion), and win up to €200 every week. No jury, no favoritism.
hero.meritocratic: Rankings are 100% meritocratic — no payment influences results

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to join the weekly music contest.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up for free in 30 seconds. Your account gives you access to listening and voting.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Discover this week's submissions and vote for your favorites in each category.
howItWorks.step3Desc: With a Pro subscription, submit your tracks and aim for the podium. Up to €200 to win.

whyUs.title: Why
whyUs.subtitle: A contest designed to highlight talent, not wallets.
whyUs.meritDesc: Rankings are based solely on community votes. No payment influences results.
whyUs.antiFraudDesc: Every vote is analyzed by our AI system to ensure contest integrity.
whyUs.rewardsDesc: €200 for 1st, €100 for 2nd, €50 for 3rd — every week, funded by our sponsors.
whyUs.communityDesc: Join artists and music lovers who listen, vote, and support each other.

artistBenefits.title: What you gain by participating
artistBenefits.subtitle: A contest designed to value artists, not just rank them.
artistBenefits.prizeDesc: The podium is rewarded every week: €200, €100, and €50 for the top three.
artistBenefits.visibilityDesc: Winners are featured on the homepage and Explore page.
artistBenefits.feedbackDesc: Each vote rates your track on 3 criteria: emotion, originality, and production.
artistBenefits.communityDesc: Get discovered by an audience that listens to and rates your music.
artistBenefits.badgesDesc: Display your results and badges on your artist profile to build credibility.

categories.title: {{count}} music categories
categories.subtitle: Every week, compete in your style.

socialProof.joinGrowing: Join a growing community of artists and enthusiasts.
socialProof.beFirst: Be among the first to join the contest. Registrations are open!

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.a1: Voting and listening are 100% free for all members. To submit a track, a Pro subscription (from €9.99/month) is required. No payment influences rankings.
faq.a2: Any artist or band can sign up. You just need to own the rights to the submitted track and follow the contest rules.
faq.a3: Each vote evaluates three criteria: originality, production, and emotion. The weighted average gives the final score. Our AI anti-fraud system ensures the integrity of every vote.
faq.a4: Every week, a sponsored prize pool rewards the top 3: 🥇 €200 for 1st, 🥈 €100 for 2nd, and 🥉 €50 for 3rd. Rewards are funded by sponsors, never by participants.
faq.a5: Our AI analyzes every vote in real time: detecting suspicious accounts, vote bursts, and abnormal behavior. Fraudulent votes are automatically invalidated.
faq.a6: You can submit one track per week per category. This ensures fair competition for all artists.

cta.title: Ready to join the contest?
cta.subtitle: Join the first beta members. The first weeks are decisive — make a name for yourself from the start.

footer.tagline: The weekly music contest where the community votes for the best independent artists.
footer.contactText: A question, partnership, or feedback? We love to chat.

seo.defaultTitle: Weekly Music Awards — The only 100% community-driven and meritocratic music contest
seo.defaultDescription: Weekly Music Awards is the weekly music contest where the community listens, votes, and rewards independent artists. Submit your music, get rated on 3 criteria (originality, production, emotion), and win up to €200 every week.
